signal_summary.data_miss_reason: GeckoTerminal API 429 rate limiting after first 5 signals (0.5s sleep insufficient)

T+24h.verdict: PROMISING — 2 large winners offset 3 small losers. But sample=5, statistically noisy.

notable_trades.note: Best performer. Short-term dip before 18% surge.
Big intraday loss but recovered. Required 24h+ hold.
Only 3-wallet signal with price data. No 24h yet.

critical_issues.impact: 85% of signals have no price data. Backtest is statistically invalid.
critical_issues.root_cause: 0.5s sleep between requests is insufficient. GeckoTerminal free tier allows ~5 req/min.
critical_issues.fix: Increase sleep to 12-15s between requests, OR cache results to disk, OR use DexScreener price history API instead.

critical_issues.impact: 0% win rate at both 1h and 4h. Signals require 24h+ horizon.
critical_issues.root_cause: Convergence signals may indicate whale accumulation — tokens often dip initially before pump.
critical_issues.fix: Switch primary exit to T+24h. Add trailing stop at -15% to protect against bad signals.

critical_issues.impact: Only 1.35 days of data. Cannot validate strategy with n=8 trades.
critical_issues.root_cause: Wallet tracker only launched on 2026-02-21. Need 30+ days for statistically significant results.
critical_issues.fix: Continue collecting. Re-run backtest in 1-2 weeks with 20+ quality signals.

critical_issues.impact: Many HIGH signals are for non-tradeable tokens (stablecoins, DEX artifacts).
critical_issues.root_cause: Signal filter catches wallets that interact with stablecoin pools, LP positions, arbitrage.
critical_issues.fix: Add quality score threshold (quality_grade >= A), min liquidity filter ($50k+), exclude DEX router interactions.

parameter_recommendations.rationale: 0% win rate at 1h/4h. 40% at 24h with 4.08 profit factor. Pattern: dip then pump.
GeckoTerminal enforces ~5 req/min. Need to respect rate limits.
Newer signals have quality_score field. Filter to high-confidence signals only.
Avoid illiquid tokens that can't absorb $100 USDC position without severe slippage.
WAR dropped -12.44% at 4h. X1000 dropped -9.31%. Cap downside before 24h hold.

paper_trader_status.note: Most trades exited at time_exit_4h. Many zero-PnL trades (likely stablecoin/USD1 positions). Best trade: +18.03% likely from pippin. Avg PnL positive but win rate only 12.5%.

next_actions: Fix GeckoTerminal rate limiting (increase sleep or switch price source)
Re-run backtest in 7+ days with full price data and 30+ signals
Switch default exit horizon to T+24h
Add quality_score and liquidity filters to signal parser
Consider Birdeye or Helius price history API as alternative to GeckoTerminal
paper_trader_issues: 8 trades with PnL=0.0 — likely stablecoin (USD1) or tokens with no actual price movement
4 trades with identical pnl=-1.8862 — likely same token, dedup not fully preventing duplicate exits
12.5% win rate matches the convergence backtest (low short-term success rate)
Only 3 trades broke even or better out of 24
